attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
a.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
a.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
a.PRODUCT_KEY,
            a.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
            a.SALES_REP_NUM,
            a.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
            a.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
            a.CANCEL_CD,
            a.SALESREP_FLG,
            a.SERVICE_FLG,
a.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,
a.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG, 
SUM
                (a.EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY)EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,
SUM
                (a.EXTENDED_QTY) EXTENDED_QTY,
SUM
                (a.TRADE_IN_AMT) TRADE_IN_AMT,
                a.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                a.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                a.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                a.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT)COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
               SUM
                (a.COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT)COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT)COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT)COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT) COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                a.COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_COST_AMT)COMP_US_COST_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
                a.AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT,
                SUM
                ( a.DV_DEBKGS_AMT) DV_DEBKGS_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT) DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_POS_AMT) DV_POS_AMT,
                SUM
                ( a.DV_DSV_AMT) DV_DSV_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_EIS_CM_AMT) DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT ) DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                SUM
                (a.DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                SUM
                ( a.DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_COST_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TTL_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,
                a.BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_TTL_AMT,
                a.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
                a.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                a.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                a.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                a.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
                a.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                a.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                a.DV_FMV_FLG,
                a.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                a.DSV_FLG,
               a.SALES_MOTION_CD,
                a.XCAT_FLG,
                a.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                 --BKGS_MSR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
            a.RO_FLG,
                 -- FY-20 RO LOGIC
            a.ELA_FLG,
                a.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                a.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                a.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
				a.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
				a.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
				a.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
				a.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */
                FROM

----ended
(
        SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
            FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
            BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY,
            BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
            BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM,
            BKGS_MSR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
            BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
            BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE CANCEL_CD,
            BKGS_MSR.SALESREP_FLG,
            BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG,
            
            CASE
                WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
            END CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,
                
            CASE
                WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
            END  CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) EXTENDED_QTY,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) TRADE_IN_AMT,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                'NA' DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
               -- SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7))  AS COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_COST_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
                0 AS AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE='Lost Order' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_DEBKGS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='N' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_POS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='Y' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_DSV_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='N' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR','SLS_ADJ','XAAS') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_COST_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TTL_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_TTL_AMT,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
                'UNKNOWN' AS RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                'UNKNOWN' AS BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                DV_FMV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG,
                COALESCE((
            CASE
                WHEN RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD
            END),'UNKNOWN') SALES_MOTION_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.XCAT_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                 --BKGS_MSR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
            COALESCE(RO.RO_FLG,'N') AS RO_FLG,
                 -- FY-20 RO LOGIC
            BKGS_MSR.ELA_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
				BKGS_MSR.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
				BKGS_MSR.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
				BKGS_MSR.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
				BKGS_MSR.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */
            FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS_MSR
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER
ON SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER  JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE BKG_CHNL_MSR
ON  BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
AND BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
ON BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON  BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.RO_MBR_PRD_SPLITPCT RO
ON BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =RO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
AND BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=RO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER=RO.SALES_REP_NUMBER


LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION RTN  
ON RTN.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY=  BKGS_MSR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY 
AND RTN.END_TV_DTM > DATE
            WHERE BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
                AND  BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG='N'
            
                AND BKGS_MSR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY not in (-999, -777)     --added 
				AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('L','Direct Sales','UNKNOWN') /* ADDING CONDITION TO ALLOW ONLY DIRECT BOOKINGS*/
          /*  GROUP BY FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
                FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
                BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY,
                BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
                BKGS_MSR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
                BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.SALESREP_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                DV_FMV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.XCAT_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                RO.RO_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ELA_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
                COALESCE((
            CASE
                WHEN RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD
            END),'UNKNOWN') */
            
            UNION all
            
              SELECT 
FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
            FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
            BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY,
            BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
            BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM,
            BKGS_MSR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
            BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
            BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE CANCEL_CD,
            BKGS_MSR.SALESREP_FLG,
            BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG,
            
            CASE
                WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG IS NULL THEN  'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
            END CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,
                
            CASE
                WHEN BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
            END  CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) EXTENDED_QTY,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) TRADE_IN_AMT,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                'NA' DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
               -- SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7))  AS COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_COST_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*BKGS_MSR.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
                0 AS AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE='Lost Order' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_DEBKGS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='N' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_POS_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='Y' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS','POS_ADJ') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_DSV_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG='N' AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR','SLS_ADJ','XAAS') THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
                --SUM
                (
            CASE
                WHEN BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT LIKE 'LCLD%' THEN COALESCE(RTN.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)*DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*BE.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT*COALESCE(RO.RS_SPLIT_PCT,1) ELSE 0
            END ) DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_COST_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TTL_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,
                CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(28,7)) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_TTL_AMT,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY  PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                'UNKNOWN' AS BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
                'UNKNOWN' AS RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                'UNKNOWN' AS BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
                DV_FMV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG,
                COALESCE((
            CASE
                WHEN RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD
            END),'UNKNOWN') SALES_MOTION_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.XCAT_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                 --BKGS_MSR.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
            COALESCE(RO.RO_FLG,'N') AS RO_FLG,
                 -- FY-20 RO LOGIC
            BKGS_MSR.ELA_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
				BKGS_MSR.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
				BKGS_MSR.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
				BKGS_MSR.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
				BKGS_MSR.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */
            FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS_MSR
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SHIER
ON SHIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER  JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE BKG_CHNL_MSR
ON  BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
AND BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=BKG_CHNL_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR FD2Y
ON BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= FD2Y.CALENDAR_DATE
AND FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BE 
ON  BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY=BE.ITEM_KEY 
AND BE.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
AND BE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.RO_MBR_PRD_SPLITPCT RO
ON BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =RO.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
AND BKGS_MSR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=RO.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=RO.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RO.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER=RO.SALES_REP_NUMBER


LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKG_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIBUTION RTN  
ON RTN.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY=  BKGS_MSR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY 
AND RTN.END_TV_DTM > DATE
            WHERE BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG='Y'
                AND  BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG='N'
            
                AND BKGS_MSR.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY  in (-999, -777)    --added 
				AND BKGS_MSR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE IN ('L','Direct Sales','UNKNOWN') /* ADDING CONDITION TO ALLOW ONLY DIRECT BOOKINGS*/
          /*  GROUP BY FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
                FD2Y.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
                BKGS_MSR.PRODUCT_KEY,
                BKGS_MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                BKGS_MSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
                BKGS_MSR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
                BKGS_MSR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.CANCEL_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.SALESREP_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.SERVICE_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
                BKG_CHNL_MSR.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                DV_FMV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                BKGS_MSR.DSV_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.XCAT_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                RO.RO_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.ELA_FLG,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                BKGS_MSR.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
                COALESCE((
            CASE
                WHEN RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE RTN.SALES_MOTION_CD
            END),'UNKNOWN') */
            
            ) a
        GROUP BY BK_FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
                FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUM_INT,
                PRODUCT_KEY,
                SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
                SALES_REP_NUM,
                WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
                BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
                CANCEL_CD,
                SALESREP_FLG,
                SERVICE_FLG,
                CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG,
                CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
                DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
                DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
                CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
                DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD, --added
                COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT, --added
                AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT, --added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT, --added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_COST_AMT,--added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_AMT,--added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TTL_AMT,--added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,--added
                BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_TTL_AMT,--added
                PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
                DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
                DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
                DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
                DV_FMV_FLG,
                BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, --added
                RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,--added
                BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,--added
                ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
                DSV_FLG,
                XCAT_FLG,
                BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
                RO_FLG,
                ELA_FLG,
                DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
                ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
                DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY,
                SALES_MOTION_CD,
				TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
				AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
				TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
				BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME	/* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */

SELECT 
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY , 
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM ,
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ,
 BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.CANCEL_CD ,
 BKGS.SALESREP_FLG ,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG , 
 BKGS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG ,
 BKGS.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG ,
 SUM(EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY,
 SUM(EXTENDED_QTY* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS EXTENDED_QTY ,
 SUM(TRADE_IN_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS TRADE_IN_AMT,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG ,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
 SUM(COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS COMP_US_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(COMP_US_COST_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
 SUM(COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END)  AS COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 SUM(ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT , 
 SUM(MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
 SUM(CASE WHEN SFH.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID='ADVANCED SERVICES' THEN (AS_PENDING_BKGS_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) ELSE 0 END ) AS AS_BKGS_AMT,
 SUM(DV_DEBKGS_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_DEBKGS_AMT,
 SUM(DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
 SUM(DV_POS_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_POS_AMT,
 SUM(DV_DSV_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_DSV_AMT,
 SUM(DV_EIS_CM_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
 SUM(DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
 SUM(DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT,
 SUM(DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_COST_AMT,
 /*BGM FY18 CHANGES START */
 --SUM(DV_NON_CLD_BKGS_NET_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT,
 SUM(DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_NET_AMT,
 SUM(DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_COST_AMT,
 0 AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_AMT,
 SUM(DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_TTL_AMT,
 --SUM(DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,
 SUM(DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_NET_AMT,
 SUM((DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT-DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT)* CASE WHEN SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE SFH.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE END) AS BKGS_GROSS_MARGIN_FX_TTL_AMT,
 /*BGM FY18 CHANGES END */
 BKGS.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
 BKGS.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
 BKGS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
 COALESCE(SFH.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,
 COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
 COALESCE(SFH.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG , 
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE , 
 BKGS.DSV_FLG,
 COALESCE((CASE WHEN BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD='N/A' THEN 'NEW' ELSE BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD END),'UNKNOWN') SALES_MOTION_CD,
  /* Added the below columns as part of  RO project  Q3FY17**/
  BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
  BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
COALESCE(BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
  BKGS.ELA_FLG,
  BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
  /* MBR - Acquistion Changes - Adding one Column */
  CASE WHEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD LIKE 'ACQ%' THEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
  BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
  BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
  BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
  BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
  BKGS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME /* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */
 FROM  
$$STGDB.WI_RSTD_BKGS_BY_WEEK BKGS
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( 
SELECT 
ALLOC.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID AS SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID, 
ALLOC.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID AS ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
ALLOC.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION, 
ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ,
ALLOC.ITEM_KEY,       
SUM(ALLOC.ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE)  AS ALLOCATION_PERCENTAGE        
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_CS_DEAL_SVC_FIN_HIER_ALLOC ALLOC 
WHERE DV_PRDT_SUB_GRP_ALLOC_SRC_CD='SPA'
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 ) SFH 
 /*ON SFH.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID = BKGS.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID */
 ON BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
 GROUP BY
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
 BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
 BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY , 
 COALESCE(SFH.SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(SFH.ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(SFH.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN'),
 BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 BKGS.SALES_REP_NUM ,
 BKGS.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ,
 BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.CANCEL_CD ,
 BKGS.SALESREP_FLG ,
 BKGS.SERVICE_FLG , 
 BKGS.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLG ,
 BKGS.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG ,
 BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG ,
 BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
 BKGS.PARTNER_PARTY_SITE_KEY,
 BKGS.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
 BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD ,
 BKGS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
 BKGS.DV_FMV_FLG , 
 BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE , 
 BKGS.DSV_FLG,
 BKGS.SALES_MOTION_CD,
 BKGS.XCAT_FLG,
 BKGS.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
 BKGS.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
 BKGS.ELA_FLG  ,
 BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
 CASE WHEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD LIKE 'ACQ%' THEN BKGS.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END,
 BKGS.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY, /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
 BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
 BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
 BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
 BKGS.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME 	/* Sept 2025 release Epic 6200 */
